videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: Who Dares to Play Merfolk in Standard? I Do!
videos.description:
Merfolk have constantly been brought back but haven't been good in a long time. This deck will definitely make our opponents respect the typal enough to consider Merfolk a tier 2 deck

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-who-dares-to-play-merfolk-in-standard-i-do
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7297271#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/J4Q7B
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/f82HB
